quote: We know that when our people feel seen and appreciated, they do their best work. Zuzo lets our team recognise each other while reinforcing the behaviours that reflect our values.
author: Samantha Howieson
title: Head of People

quote: I love that our team has the freedom to spend their rewards on anything they want - no more being limited to just one voucher.
author: Rehana Emandien
title: Talent Acquisition

quote: Zuzo is honestly a game-changer. The platform is super user-friendly, and the whole process feels really seamless. What a way to spread positivity across the team!
author: Michelle Jaffe
title: Head of People

quote: Zuzo has really boosted morale and become a key part of our culture.
author: Rehana Emandien
title: Talent Acquisition

quote: Adding some Zuzo-zing to the Wonga-way, was like adding gasoline to a flame that had already been lit.
author: Deryn Bolton
title: Founder
